books.title: The First Men in the Moon
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: Two British men become the first humans to reach the Moon.

books.title: Riders of the Purple Sage
books.author: Zane Grey
books.summary: On a ranch in southern Utah, Jane Withersteen refuses to marry a local church elder, and together with her ranch hand and a mysterious gunman she must face retaliatory violence, theft, and murder.

books.title: Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass
books.author: Frederick Douglass
books.summary: Frederick Douglass describes his youth as a slave in Maryland and his desire to be a free man.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: The Princess and Curdie
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A young miner accepts a mysterious commission that will test his faithfulness and restore justice to a faltering kingdom.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The School for Scandal
books.author: Richard Brinsley Sheridan
books.summary: Despite their best efforts, the rumormongers of 18th-century London are disappointed by their targets.

books.title: Lady Into Fox
books.author: David Garnett
books.summary: A newly married young woman is suddenly transformed into a fox, to the consternation and enduring grief of her husband.

books.title: Notes from Underground
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: A man living alone in St. Petersburg writes memoirs describing his alienation from modern society.

books.title: The King in Yellow
books.author: Robert W. Chambers
books.summary: Ten short stories of madness, hauntings, romance, and art.

books.title: The House of the Dead
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: A ex-convict in 19th-century Russia reminisces on his experiences in a Siberian prison.

books.title: The Brooklyn Murders
books.author: G. D. H. Cole
books.summary: Scotland Yard and a pair of amateur sleuths investigate the case of two heirs to a fortune who apparently murdered each other.

books.title: The Journal of a Disappointed Man
books.author: W. N. P. Barbellion
books.summary: A young naturalist with multiple sclerosis describes his life and love of nature.

books.title: The End of the World
books.author: Geoffrey Dennis
books.summary: A philosophical reflection on how the end of the world would unfold based on hypothetical variables and relevant knowledge and historical context.

books.title: The Faerie Queene
books.author: Edmund Spenser
books.summary: Six knights embodying Christian virtues embark on allegorical quests.

books.title: The Coming of Bill
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A domineering author of books on eugenics and hygiene makes a match between her niece and an idle artist, intending them to raise a son according to her principles, regardless of the consequences.

books.title: The Food of the Gods
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: Two scientists discover a substance which promotes rapid and extreme growth in plants, animals, and humans, leading to unexpected and alarming consequences.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: O. Henry
books.summary: A collection of O. Henry short stories, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Demian
books.author: Hermann Hesse
books.summary: A boy goes on a journey of spiritual growth.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.
